fault_hypothesis: The conflict detection on line 61 uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`), which incorrectly accepts a booking that touches the boundary of an existing one. The logic should use strict inequalities (`<`, `>`) to correctly reject such cases as conflicts.

spec.expr: (any(not (b__1 <= s or a__1 >= e) for s, e in timeline)) == (any(not (b__1 < s or a__1 > e) for s, e in timeline))

constraints.intent: The conflict detection logic must correctly identify overlaps, including boundary-touching cases.

spec.expr: all(b__1 != s for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: If no conflict is detected, the new window's end must not touch the start of any existing booking.

spec.expr: all(a__1 != e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: If no conflict is detected, the new window's start must not touch the end of any existing booking.

spec.expr: not __cbfl_result[0] or all(window[1] < s or window[0] > e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: An accepted booking must not touch the boundaries of any existing reservation.
